roles.title: Manager Group Capital
roles.description: Oversee Dyno Nobel's global capital planning, governance, and investment evaluation. This role ensures that capital is allocated strategically, governance frameworks are robust, and investment decisions are grounded in commercial insight.

roles.title: Finance Operations Analyst
roles.description: Managing financial planning, reporting, and cost control for Australian manufacturing plants. The position requires collaboration with various stakeholders to ensure accurate budgeting, forecasting, and financial analysis aligned with the strategic objectives of the business.

roles.title: Senior Tax Analyst
roles.description: Responsible for delivering high quality tax reporting, compliance, and advisory support across the business. This is a broad and hands on role suited to a technically strong tax professional looking to deepen their corporate exposure.

roles.title: Risk Management Analyst
roles.description: Service the technical and data engine of the team. Your remit will include risk reporting, systems administration, dashboard development, and supporting enterprise wide decision making and high quality data led insights.

roles.title: Senior Manager, Enterprise Risk
roles.description: As the company transitions into a standalone, globally integrated explosives business, the enterprise risk function is being rebuilt from the ground up. Reporting to the VP, Risk and Insurance Global, this role will play a crucial part in shaping the way Dyno Nobel identifies, manages, and leverages risk to support performance, growth, and governance.

roles.title: Tax Analyst
roles.description: Preparing tax returns, assisting with tax effective communication, supporting income tax return operations as well as preparing supporting documentation for the global operations.

roles.title: Finance Business Partner Technology
roles.description: Oversee the financial health and strategy of the technology group function, including reporting, forecasting, and financial planning. Ensure accurate reporting and analysis, providing insights to support strategic decision making, and delivering global product reporting.

roles.title: FP&A Analyst
roles.description: Financial planning and analysis within Dyno Nobel's Asia Pacific segment. The role involves managing financial performance, forecasting, budgeting, and supporting strategic initiatives, including financial modelling and reporting, data analytics, process improvement, and financial performance management.

roles.title: Corporate Accountant
roles.description: Reporting to the manager, you will deliver reliable financial outcomes across the general ledger, consolidation, and external reporting. You will strengthen the control environment, support ASX reporting cycles, and provide analysis that supports decision making.

roles.title: Financial Controller APAC
roles.description: Lead financial governance and transformation at scale, oversee robust compliance reporting and strategic functional management across DNAP, while also managing operations through the successful sale or closure by providing invaluable transaction experience.

roles.title: Finance Data Analyst
roles.description: Harness the power of data to enhance financial decision making, improve forecasting accuracy, and deliver meaningful insights that support business performance. You will lead automation and process improvement initiatives, ensuring teams and senior leadership have timely, reliable, and actionable information to guide strategy and operations.

roles.title: Financial Accountant
roles.description: Deliver reliable financial outcomes across the general ledger, consolidation, and external reporting, including year end and half year reporting. Prepare workings under AASB and IFRS, and support audit and review processes.

roles.title: Finance Business Partner Transformation
roles.description: Reporting to the VP Global Transformation, you will play a pivotal role in tracking, validating, and reporting progress against a global transformation agenda, connecting initiative level activity to business cases, budgets, forecasts, and ultimately the results leaders are accountable for.

roles.title: Senior Lead, Finance Business Partnering
roles.description: Lead the finance business partnering function, embedding finance as a trusted value adding partner to senior leaders across operations, commercial, and functional teams. Reporting directly to the CFO, you will set the direction for the partnering function, lead a high calibre team, and ensure finance plays a central role in strategic decision making, performance management, and commercial outcomes.

roles.title: Senior Manager, Risk and Insurance
roles.description: Responsible for designing, placing, and continually improving Dyno Nobel's global insurance program so it properly reflects the group's risk profile, balance sheet priorities, and growth plans. The role takes ownership of how catastrophic and operational risks are transferred to the market, with a focus on high hazard manufacturing, storage, and logistics assets across multiple regions.
